findings.description: Object.prototype pollution via nested input object merging in GraphQL mutations.
findings.reproduction:
1. Send mutation with __proto__ key in input object
2. Verify Object.prototype.admin is true on server context

findings.description: Persistent Prototype Pollution via Socket.IO event payload manipulation.
findings.reproduction:
1. Intercept WS frame
2. Inject payload into JSON event
3. Verify pollution on subsequent events

1. Open console
2. Run payload
3. Check {}.polluted === true

findings.description: Static analysis detected a dangerous sink using untrusted user input in a merge function.
findings.reproduction: Review source.js at line 156 for missing __proto__ validation.

findings.description: Vulnerable sink in React Flight Protocol parsing leading to DOM XSS.
findings.reproduction: Navigate to URL with __proto__ parameter targeting React state

findings.description: Unicode character escaping detected in parameter parsing bypassing standard WAF regex.
findings.reproduction: Send encoded payload to API endpoint
